content:
# Inspectional Services

The mission of the Inspectional Services Department (ISD) is to protect the health and safety of Boston's business and residential communities by enforcing building, housing, health, and environmental regulations effectively and consistently.

Toggle

Page Sections

Our Commissioners Bulletins are official guides to provide updates, guidance and clarification on the implementation of Boston's codes, policies and regulations.

Commissioners Bulletins

##### Take Advantage of our online portal

The online option saves you time — you can apply online and even print out your permit when it has been approved by us. Right now, you can apply for some of our permits online, but the list will continue to grow over time.

Go to our online portal

Find everything you need to know about the necessary permits for your projects.

## Our Divisions

Housing

Find helpful housing resources and programs for renters, landlords, contractors and property owners.

Health Division

The Health Division oversees and enforces food and sanitary laws in the city, including all establishments that serve food.

Environmental Sanitation

This division is comprised of three sections: Rodent Control, Site Cleanliness, and Auto Shop Licensing and Enforcement

Constituent Services

The Constituent Services Division is composed of call center representatives, community liaisons, and the Investigation and Enforcement Team.

Weights and Measures

We protect consumers when they buy products sold by weight or volume. We inspect devices like taximeters, gas pumps, home heating oil trucks, and scales.

## About Our Work

We are made up of five regulatory divisions. Our goal is to protect and improve the quality of life for all Boston residents. Our mission is to serve the public by protecting the health, safety, and environmental stability of Boston's business and residential communities.

Learn About Our Work
